title: prunus × sultana
intro: Prunus × sultana, also known as the sultana or Austrian plum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Prunus genus, a group of flowering plants in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Prunus × sultana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Prunus × sultana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility and effectiveness.
